content.en:
"It turns out that if you want to cultivate the Secret Domain Ultimate System, you have to cultivate the Blood Sea Ultimate System first. "

And it is difficult for many people to cultivate one ultimate system at the same time, such as the giant axe extreme respect himself, who has studied the abyssal star ultimate system for so long, but has not comprehended the rules of the abyssal star.

One can imagine how difficult it must be to cultivate the Blood Sea Ultimate System to the Perfection Realm first, and then to cultivate the Secret Domain Ultimate System.

In case it is not suitable for the Blood Sea Ultimate System, it will be more difficult to cultivate~ refine.

"Then cultivate the Blood Sea Cultivation Extreme System first!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Subsequently.

One of his replica bodies traveled to a special place in the Dimensional Sea, the Sea of Imperpetual Blood.

The Imperpetual Blood Sea is the source of the ultimate system of the Blood Sea.

At the beginning, that Blood Demon Extreme Venerable had realized the Blood Sea Ultimate System in the Immortal Blood Sea.

Ye Tian quickly rushed to the Wuheng Blood Sea, and as soon as he came here, he sensed some existence at the peak of the Nine Realms, and they obviously also wanted to go through the Blood Sea Ultimate System.

After all, the Blood Sea Ultimate System is indeed powerful, but if you want to rely on the Blood Sea Ultimate System to break through to become the Ultimate Realm Master, it is a bit extravagant.

"There is an existence at the peak of the Nine Realms who has mastered the ultimate body of the Blood Sea of the Consummation Realm, and has also cultivated the Extreme System of the Secret Realm, the ultimate will should also be very strong, and the probability of breaking through to the ultimate realm master is extremely high, maybe when it will break through, then it is impossible for the other Nine Realms peaks to break through to the ultimate realm master on this path. "

Ye Tian didn't expect that Nine Realms peak breakthrough to fail, his goal was very simple, that is, to bring the Blood Sea Ultimate System to the realm of the Blood Sea Ultimate Body.

Whether he could raise the Blood Sea Ultimate System to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, he really didn't care.

Ye Tian directly entered the Immortal Blood Sea, this Immortal Blood Sea was very large, and there were also some ultimate creatures inside.

He wanted to copy the ultimate talent of those ultimate creatures, so that it would be easier to cultivate the Blood Sea Ultimate System, and the efficiency of comprehension would far surpass that of the other Nine Realms peaks, which could save him countless time.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to encounter an ultimate creature with an impermanent blood sea, the other party had the ultimate talent of the blood sea, Ye Tian directly copied it into his hand, and then fused it.

In this way, it would be easier for him to comprehend the Blood Sea Ultimate System.

In order to be able to master the Blood Sea Ultimate System faster, Ye Tian directly traded a part of the Blood Sea Ultimate System with a Nine Realms Peak.

In this way, he could more easily improve the Blood Sea Ultimate System, so that he could cultivate to an extremely high realm.

After a period of time, Ye Tian embarked on the Blood Sea Ultimate System, broke through the Ultimate Stage of the Blood Sea Ultimate System, and then began to create the ultimate dimensional killing moves of the Blood Sea Ultimate System.

This process is more difficult, and many Nine Realms peaks are trapped in this step.

There are still very few peak powerhouses of the Nine Realms who have comprehended the ultimate dimension killing moves of the Blood Sea Ultimate System, after all, only some special worlds and earths are suitable for comprehending the ultimate dimensional killing moves, and it is too difficult to forcibly comprehend them by themselves.

However, for Ye Tian, it was easy to comprehend the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move.

It only took him a few years before he succeeded in creating the ultimate dimensional killing move of the Blood Sea Ultimate System, the Blood Sea Body.

Once this ultimate dimensional killing move is cast, the body is almost immortal and indestructible, and it is also an extremely powerful ultimate dimensional killing move.

Subsequently, he successfully completed the Blood Sea Ultimate, became the Ultimate Master of the Blood Sea Ultimate, and then continued to absorb the power of the Impermanent Blood Sea to make the Blood Sea Ultimate's body continue to grow and improve, and he was also constantly improving the Blood Sea Ultimateness System.

Unconsciously, hundreds of millions of yuan years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's Blood Sea Ultimate System had already reached the Xiaocheng realm, as long as he comprehended the Blood Sea Ultimate Rules, he could break through to the Dacheng realm.

And for him, it is naturally not difficult to have the ultimate talent of the blood sea and comprehend the ultimate rules of the blood sea.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's body was filled with the aura of the ultimate rules of the Blood Sea, he successfully comprehended the ultimate rules of the Blood Sea, and countless blood sea powers poured into his body, allowing his Blood Sea Ultimate Body to break through to the Dacheng realm.

"After breaking through, the next step is to continuously improve the ultimate rules of the blood sea, and then comprehend the ultimate rules of the ninefold blood sea, and raise the ultimate body of the blood sea to the realm of perfection. "

It would take a long time to do this, even if Ye Tian had the ultimate talent of the Blood Sea.

However, he could use the Stone of Eternal Night to increase the speed of enlightenment a little.

In addition, there are also whirlpools in the sea of impermanence, and in these whirlpools, it will be more efficient to comprehend the ultimate rules of the sea of blood.

But every whirlpool is occupied, and if you want to cultivate in these whirlpools, you must drive one of them out.

Soon.

Ye Tian chose a blood sea vortex and went directly into it.

"Get out!"

An existence at the peak of the Nine Realms opened his eyes and made a direct move on Ye Tian.

Ye Tian unleashed the hand of the Heavenly Abyss and directly grabbed this existence at the peak of the Nine Realms.

"Spare your life!"

This Nine Realms Peak was dumbfounded, he never expected to encounter such a demonic Nine Realms Peak, and his strength far surpassed him.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian threw it out directly, and then occupied this whirlpool, and it was here that he began to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Blood Sea.

This Nine Realms peak seems to be very famous, after he was kicked out, Ye Tian's reputation will be great, and no strong person will dare to enter Ye Tian's place.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian has always comprehended the ultimate rules of the Blood Sea.

100 million yuan years!

A billion domain years!

Before you know it, five billion domain yuan years have passed.

Now.

Ye Tian's body was filled with the terrifying Blood Sea Ultimate Rule, and he had reached the limit of the Eightfold Extreme, and he was attacking the Ninefold Ultimate Rule.

A certain moment.

Rumble!!!!!

The Blood Sea Ultimate Rule broke through, and the aura of the Nine Blood Sea Ultimate Rule burst out from Ye Tian's body.

At the same time, his body frantically devoured the power of the Impermanence Blood Sea, thus allowing his body to complete its transformation and elevate the ultimate body of the Blood Sea to the realm of perfection.

After a long time.

Ye Tian's blood sea ultimate body has finally broken through and reached the realm of consummation.

"It's done, at this point, my Blood Sea Ultimate Body is already in the realm of perfection, and I can go to the Extreme System of the Secret Realm and comprehend the ultimate rules of the Secret Realm!"

Swish!

He crossed the dimensional void in one step, left here, and then headed to the side of the Strange Realm.

In the vicinity of the Secret Domain, there is a special place, which is very suitable for the cultivation of the ultimate system of the Secret Domain, and he is going to practice there.
